caption: The video shows a tablet placed on a table, displaying a screen with the "IDEASBOX" logo and a shutdown menu. The menu offers an option to shut down the system, with a note indicating that it will boot in Quick Boot Mode next time. The tablet is positioned in front of a colorful box featuring illustrations of various devices and objects, suggesting a creative or educational theme. A person's hand is visible in the background, possibly interacting with the setup. The scene appears to be set in a well-lit environment, likely a classroom or workshop, where the tablet and box are being used for a demonstration or activity.
